zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Freville於1400年出生在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯時，她的父親Sir Baldwin Freville III33歲，母親Maud Scrope26歲。她於1418年5月23日與Sir Hugh Willoughby在英國諾廷加姆爾沃拉阿頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1493年1月8日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾拉普沃斯享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾米德萊頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Freville于1400年出生在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Baldwin Freville III33岁，母亲Maud Scrope26岁。她于1418年5月23日与Sir Hugh Willoughby在英国諾廷加姆爾沃拉阿頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1493年1月8日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾拉普沃斯享年93岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾米德萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Freville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Préville): habitational name from (La) Préville, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Previl
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a shortened form of French Préville (see Preville ).
ornamental name composed of French pré ‘meadow’ and a shortened form of ville ‘settlement’ (see Vil ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Freville was born in 1400, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir Baldwin Freville III, was 33 and her mother, Maud Scrope, was 26. She married Sir Hugh Willoughby on 23 May 1418, in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 8 January 1493, in Lapworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 93, and was buried in Middleton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Freville est née en 1400, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Baldwin Freville III, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Maud Scrope, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Willoughby le 23 mai 1418, à Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1493, à Lapworth, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterrée à Middleton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Frevilleが1400年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Baldwin Freville IIIは33歳，母Maud Scropeは26歳であった。1418年5月23日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオラトンでSir Hugh Willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1493年1月8日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアラプウオルスで93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアミッドレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Freville(이)가 1400년 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Baldwin Freville III(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Scrope(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1418년 5월 23일 영국 노틴그함실르 울라턴에서 Sir Hugh Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1493년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 라p워스에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 미들레턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Freville nasceu em 1400, em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Baldwin Freville III, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Maud Scrope, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Willoughby em 23 de maio de 1418, em Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1493, em Lapworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 93 anos, e foi sepultada em Middleton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Freville родилась в 1400 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Baldwin Freville III было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Scrope, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Willoughby 23 мая 1418 г. в местности воллатон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 8 января 1493 г. в местности лапворт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 93 лет и была похоронена в местности миддлетон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Hugh Willoughby el 23 de mayo de 1418, en Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1493, en Lapworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultada en Middleton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
